cases.name: scope_table_acceptance_bundle
cases.text:
1.3 Scope
The contractor shall provide on-site engineering support and submit weekly status reports.
CLIN 0001 | Base Operations Support | 12 Months | FFP
CLIN 0002 | Surge Engineering | Optional | FFP
Pricing Table | Labor Category | Hours | Rate | Extended Price
Acceptance Level | AQL | Remedy
Deliverable review failures trigger corrective action within 5 days.
2.1 Deliverables
The contractor shall submit a transition plan, staffing matrix, and monthly QA report.

1.5 General Requirements
The contractor shall maintain the project schedule, deliver design submittals, and support review meetings.
5.0 Deliverables
Monthly deliverables include a status report, issue log, and corrective action tracker.
